caption: A person’s hands are seen opening a white cardboard box sitting on a table in a room with "JASPERS CASEBREAKS" branding. In the background, a man wearing a black t-shirt and a white baseball cap watches the process. On the table are several other similar boxes, some with "CLEARLY" printed on them, and a red plastic cup. The words "CASEBREAKS" appear in large letters across the bottom of the scene, and the website "CASEBREAKS.com" is visible in small logos on the screen. As the video progresses, the person's hands move to the top of the box, peeling back the sealing tape to open the container. The camera focuses on the hands and the box, while the man in the background remains stationary, observing the opening of the package.
